channel.title: Svelte on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Svelte on Arrans github.io

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, Capacitor, Ionic, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: open-source-labs/Svelvet
item.description: 🎛 A Svelte library for building dynamic, infinitely customizable node-based user interfaces and flowcharts

item.title: janosh/awesome-sveltekit
item.description: Awesome examples of SvelteKit in the wild

item.title: codesandbox/codesandbox-client
item.description: An online IDE for rapid web development

item.title: Tropix126/fluent-svelte
item.description: A faithful implementation of Microsoft’s Fluent Design System in Svelte.

item.title: nichady/golte
item.description: Render Svelte components in your Go http handlers.
